# NAP Orbit

> Local visibility platform for business Name, Address, and Phone (NAP) consistency across maps, directories, and AI search.

## Docs

- [Home](https://nap.rankorbit.com/): Product overview and landing page
- [Pricing](https://nap.rankorbit.com/?focus=pricing): Plans and pricing
- [Sign in](https://nap.rankorbit.com/login): Client sign in
- [Sign up](https://nap.rankorbit.com/signup): Create a client account
- [Terms of Service](https://nap.rankorbit.com/terms): Terms
- [Privacy Policy](https://nap.rankorbit.com/privacy): Privacy policy
